feed.title: SAP Community - ABAP RESTful Application Programming Model
feed.subtitle: ABAP RESTful Application Programming Model Q&A in SAP Community

entry.title: Archiving strategy for CDS-based AFO reports in S/4HANA
entry.content:
In our ECC landscape, we have  implemented an archiving solution using a custom utility class and ZARIX tables based on Info Structures to support reporting and meet performance requirements.

With the transition to S/4HANA, our reporting is now based on Analysis for Office (AFO) using CDS views. 

What approaches are you using for archiving or data aging for data consumed by CDS views? How do you enable access to historical or archived data in AFO reports within S/4HANA?

We would greatly appreciate insights and experiences from the community regarding practical and scalable solutions in S/4HANA environments.

Thank you in advance for sharing your knowledge and recommendations.

entry.title: CPI should call a report (with Selection-Screen) in S/4.How to make it a RAP ABAP Object.
entry.content:
A report (with Selection-Screen) needs to be called by CPI, how to achieve the same using RAP ABAP (I'm new to the Language). I can make the report being called in Class using SUBMIT and using AI figured the class can be called in CDS Entity.

Can someone refer me to a document, which can make me achieve the object.

People can use a simple example to explain the process.

entry.title: Service Definition based on Consumption CDS View (BOPF-Based CDS View)
entry.content:
Hello experts,

I am curious if it is possible to create a Service Definition based on the BOPF-based consumption CDS View? This would be theoretically an easier way to create and publish OData V2 or V4 services in SAP, but still not replacing all the backbone from the old programming mode for SAP Fiori to ABAP Restful Programming Model (RAP).

I tried this on an SAP S/4HANA 2025 FPS00 system and the service definition and service binding could be created and activated without any problems, but later one when checking the metadata of the new OData V4 service I am receiving some strange issues regarding a quantity field and its unit of measure

Unit code property 'DAIRYDELIVPROPOSALBASEQTY' not found in complex type 'CT_B93A2928B399FBCED4EC7994740'

it is quite strange since for me the related annotations are properly defined in the consumption CDS View.

Is anyone tried this out and maybe could confirm if this is working or not?

Many thanks,
Catalin

entry.title: RAP unmanaged Excel Upload
entry.content:
Hi Folks,
         i want to create a RAP Object to upload data using excel to CK74N and i don't want to create a draft table  for Unmanage scenario . Please let me know is there any other way where i can leverage RAP concepts to create a Upload action  without creating any draft and persistence table in the Behavior Definition

entry.title: Any way to determine whether its a CREATE or EDIT operation inside a RAP dynamic Feature Instance
entry.content:
I am having a custom RAP BO Draft enabled Managed application having SalesOrder Header and Composition Sales Item Child.

I have implemented one dynamic feature instance for quantity field (KWMENG) of Item view

field( features : instance ) KWMENG;

Inside the method get_instance_features, I have implemented the logic to make the qty field in the item table as read only which is working perfectly fine

Now what i want is , if the above feature instance is called during CREATE , then I want to skip the logic of making this field read only and if its called using EDIT button , then i want the logic to be applied.

So basically, I need a way to identify inside get_instance_features, whether this method is triggered from CREATE or EDIT button? Can someone kindly help in understanding how to identify this ?

Below is my code for feature instance for disabling the Qty field works fine (but in both CREATE and EDIT operation)

METHOD get_instance_features.
     DATA: lv_str type string.

     lv_str = 'ABC'.

     if requested_features-%field-kwmeng = if_abap_behv=>mk-on.
       "Reading records for selected Key fields
       READ entities of ZR_Sales_Header in local mode
         entity ZS_Header
         fields ( vbeln gbstk )
         with corresponding #( keys )
         result DATA(lt_res_hdr)

         entity ZS_Header by \_SalesOrdItem
         fields ( vbeln posnr kwmeng )
         with corresponding #( keys )
         result DATA(lt_res_itm)
         failed DATA(lt_failed).

       TRY.
         "Fetching the order status from the sales order header (Using 1st record from item table
         "as all items will have same header status
         "DATA(lv_ord_status) = lt_res_hdr[ %tky = lt_res_itm[ 1 ]-%tky-vbeln ]-%data-gbstk.
          DATA(lv_ord_status) = lt_res_hdr[ %tky = lt_res_itm[ 1 ]-%tky ]-%data-gbstk.

        CATCH cx_sy_itab_line_not_found.
         clear lv_ord_status.
       ENDTRY.

       "If order status is not completed
        if lv_ord_status <> 'C'.

           "Fetching alternate line items of order if status is not completed
           result = VALUE #( for ls_res_item in lt_res_itm  
                              ( %tky = ls_res_item-%tky
                                %field-kwmeng = if_abap_behv=>FC-f-read_only            )
                           ).
        endif.
     endif.
  ENDMETHOD.

entry.title: UI Annotation to change field label dynamically in ABAP RAP
entry.content:
Hi,

I have created a Fiori APP using ABAP RAP framework. I need to set the label text of an input field dynamically as the short text of the MIC maintained in the master. I have written the below code in Metadata Extension, but the text is not changing dynamically. The label is currently coming from the custom data element which the field is linked to. 

 

@ui:{ fieldGroup: [{ qualifier: 'tqQualityDetails' , position: 10 } ],

hidden: #(hideHectolitreWeight) }

@Consumption.dynamicLabel: {

label: '&1',

binding: [{

index: 1,

// parameter: '',

element: 'txtHectolitreWeight',

// replaceWith: #LOW,

format:#TEXT

// offset: 0,

// length: 40

}]

}

HectolitreWeight;

 

Any help in this regard would be very much helpful.

Thanks,

Vinod Iyer

entry.title: SAP REST API – SICF service active but Postman returns 404 “No suitable resource found”
entry.content:
Hello Experts,

I am trying to build a custom REST API in ABAP. i have created HANDLER,PROVIDER & SICG SERVICE.

i got this message: 

404 Not Found No suitable resource found
Also, my external breakpoint in the provider class is not triggered.

entry.title: Modfiy Entities EML for creating records of only child entitiy does not work
entry.content:
This is regarding using standard RAP BO R_FunctionalLocationTP to create records in my se38 regular abap program.

The scenario is that already functional location exists in the standard db table IFLOT (W335-101HB-A001-S4) . But i want to create a class type as 0003 which is a child/associated entity of the RAP BO using EML in my SE38 program.

data: lt_floc_class type table for create r_functionallocationtp\_classification,
          lt_floc_class_char type table for create R_FuncnlLocClfnClassTP\_characteristic.

    lt_floc_class = value #( ( FunctionalLocation = 'W335-101HB-A001-S4'

                               %target = value #( (
                                                    FunctionalLocation = 'W335-101HB-A001-S4'
                                                     "ClassInternalID = ''
                                                     ClassType = '003'
                                                     "ChangeNumber = ''
                                                     %control-ClassType = if_abap_behv=>mk-on
                                                      ) )

                           ) ).

    modify "entities of r_functionallocationtp
      entity R_FunctionalLocationTP
      create by \_classification
      auto fill cid with lt_floc_class
       mapped data(ls_mapped)
       failed data(ls_failed)
       reported data(ls_reported).

    commit entities
     response of R_FunctionalLocationTP
     failed final(lt_commit_failed)
     reported final(lt_commit_reported).

The above code is not creating the class type in KSSK table/IL03 table and in debugging there is no record in failed itab so I am not able to identify where is the issue.

entry.title: How to pass longtext via extraction enable CDS to Datasphere
entry.content:
I need to pass longtext in datasphere using extraction enabled CDS. However, neither longtext nor table functions can be used for it.
Could you please to identify the best way to do it.

Regards,
Malika Bathla.

SAP Datasphere SAP S/4HANA Embedded Analytics SAP S/4HANA

entry.title: ABAP Restful, annotation for navigaton with condition
entry.content:
Dear all,

when annotating a CDS view for intent-based navigation, is it possible to use semantic object and semantic object action based on a condition?

Example: the CDS view has a field "SalesDocument" and another field with the "SalesDocumentType" (e.g. order or contract) . Is it possible to annotate the CDS view in a way that by clicking on  "SalesDocument" the corresponding app will be called depending on the document type (order -> display order app, contract -> display contract app)?

Thanks,

entry.title: High importance flag in outlook from ABAP for email using SO_DOCUMENT_SEND_API
entry.content: I have a requirement to show high importance flag in outlook which means showing red exclamation in  the outlook mail. In my abap code we are using SO_DOCUMENT_SEND_API1 , we have tried to set the priority in document_data  even then we didn't receive the high priority email with red exclamation in the email. How can i find solution for this?

entry.title: I want to Create a REST Data Entity using BTP Destination. but unable retrieve expected output.
entry.content:
Hi All,

I want to create a REST Data Entity from my build apps workspace for 'API_CV_ATTACHMENT_SRV' (/sap/opu/odata/sap/API_CV_ATTACHMENT_SRV/) odata service.

I have a BTP destination already configured.

1.Adding BTP Destination in Base section2. adding odata path in the retrieve section3.Test the data entity. got200

4.But not receiving the expected databut when I am retrieving data I am getting below result, it returns status -200. which is OK.

 

But I am not at all expecting this response. It is returning bunch of standard available catalog details. so something is wrong here.

 

Can someone please guide me what is going wrong here.

Is there any specific way I should configure my BTP Destination?

entry.title: Released API for F-07 / FB01 / F-44 equivalent posting in SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud
entry.content:
Hello SAP Community,

I am currently migrating a custom ECC ABAP report (Bank Reconciliation Statement)
to SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud using the RAP (RESTful ABAP Programming) framework as
a Managed Business Object with Draft.

In ECC, the report posted FI entries using BDC recordings for the following
transactions:

- F-06 → Incoming Customer Payment
- F-07 → Outgoing Vendor Payment
- FB01 → Manual GL Document Posting
- F-44 → Vendor Special GL Clearing (Indicator K)

Since BDC is NOT permitted in Public Cloud, I have been searching for the
equivalent released APIs.


✅ RESOLVED — F-06:
I found and implemented CCPAPI_CUSTOMER_PAYMENT_SRV (Communication Scenario
SAP_COM_0276) via OData HTTP POST. This works correctly.


❌ STILL BLOCKED — F-07, FB01, F-44:

► F-07 (Outgoing Payment):
- API_PAYMENT_INITIATION_SRV → Scope mismatch. Covers payment orders,
not direct FI document posting
- I_JournalEntryTP EML → Error: "The operation CREATE is not activated
for entity I_JOURNALENTRYTP"

► FB01 (Manual GL Posting):
- Same BAPI blocked as above
- I_JournalEntryTP EML → Same CREATE not activated error
- No generic GL document posting API found on SAP API Business Hub

► F-44 (Vendor Special GL Clearing):
- I_JournalEntryTP EML with SpecialGLIndicator field → Same CREATE
not activated error
- Factoring Clearing SOAP API → FI-CA module only, not applicable for FI-AP
- No AP account clearing API found


My Questions:
─────────────
1. What is the correct released API / RAP Business Object to post an
outgoing payment (F-07 equivalent) in Public Cloud?

2. What is the correct API for posting a manual GL document (FB01 equivalent)
programmatically from a RAP behavior class?

3. What is the correct API for clearing a vendor special GL indicator K item
(F-44 equivalent)?

4. Is I_JournalEntryTP the correct Business Object for all of these? If yes,
why is the CREATE operation not activated and how can it be enabled?

5. Is there a Communication Scenario that needs to be set up for
I_JournalEntryTP to work via EML?


Technical Context:
──────────────────
- Development: RAP Managed BO, ABAP for Cloud (Tier 1)
- Root BO: ZI_FI_BRS_STATEMENT (based on I_JournalEntryItem)
- Action: PostBRSItems inside behavior class zbp_i_fi_brs_statement
- System: SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition
- Already tried: MODIFY ENTITIES OF I_JournalEntryTP with COMMIT ENTITIES

Any guidance, SAP Notes, KBA references, or working code examples would be
greatly appreciated.

Thank you in advance!

entry.title: SAP Fiori elements: Enable Internal Navigation to Different Detail Page
entry.content:
In the tutorial, instruction says:

Application developers must ensure that an appropriate route has been defined in the manifest for the detail page. Here's an example:

Route defined in manifest

"sap.ui5": {
  "routing": {
     "routes": [
        ......
        {
           "pattern": "SalesOrderManage({key})/_Item({key2})/_MaterialDetails({key3}):?query:",
           "name": "CustomMaterialDetailsPage",
           "target": "CustomMaterialDetailsPage"
        }
      ]
    }
}

Is there an example of how the "target": "CustomMaterialDetailsPage" must be defined, pointing to the specific detail page? I am trying to do this using a oData V2 service. Whatever documentation I see for targets, all have examples using View or Components, none pointing to pages defined under sap.ui.generic.app in manifest.json.

Thanks

entry.title: Adding new item to an existing PO failing with I_PUCHASEORDERTP_2 in S/4Hana Cloud
entry.content:
Hello All,

I have a requirement where i have to add new items with cost center to an existing PO. I am using below code. 
NOTE : ls_po_num-purchaseorderbycustomer has PO number that i want to update.
              ls_po_item-accountassignmentnumber has the last acc asst number.
              GL Account is fetched automatically by the system in the backend.

  DATA(lv_acc_no) = ls_po_item-accountassignmentnumber.
    LOOP AT lt_vbap_temp ASSIGNING FIELD-SYMBOL(<ls_vbap>).
      lv_acc_no = lv_acc_no + 1.
      DATA(lv_cid)  = |{ cv_itmcid }{ lv_acc_no }|.
      DATA(lv_cid1) = |{ cv_itmacc }{ lv_acc_no }|.

      APPEND INITIAL LINE TO lt_purchase_order_item ASSIGNING FIELD-SYMBOL(<ls_poi>).

      <ls_poi>-%tky-purchaseorder = ls_po_num-purchaseorderbycustomer.
      <ls_poi>-%target = VALUE #( BASE <ls_poi>-%target ( %cid = lv_cid
                                 material                  = <ls_vbap>-material
                                 plant                     = <ls_vbap>-plant
                                 orderquantity             = <ls_vbap>-ordqty
                                 purchaseorderquantityunit = <ls_vbap>-purchaseorderquantityunit
                                 purchaseorderitem         = <ls_vbap>-purchaseorderitem
                                 netpriceamount            = <ls_vbap>-netpriceamount
                                 documentcurrency          = <ls_vbap>-documentcurrency
                                 accountassignmentcategory = <ls_vbap>-accassigncat

                                 %control = VALUE #( material = if_abap_behv=>mk-on
                                                     plant = if_abap_behv=>mk-on
                                                     orderquantity = if_abap_behv=>mk-on
                                                     purchaseorderquantityunit = if_abap_behv=>mk-on
                                                     purchaseorderitem = if_abap_behv=>mk-on
                                                     netpriceamount = if_abap_behv=>mk-on
                                                     documentcurrency = if_abap_behv=>mk-on
                                                     accountassignmentcategory = if_abap_behv=>mk-on )
                                   ) ).

      APPEND INITIAL LINE TO lt_po_acc_assign ASSIGNING FIELD-SYMBOL(<ls_acc>).
      <ls_acc>-%cid_ref = lv_cid.
      <ls_acc>-%tky-PurchaseOrder = ls_po_num-purchaseorderbycustomer.
      <ls_acc>-%tky-purchaseorderitem = <ls_vbap>-purchaseorderitem.
      <ls_acc>-%target = VALUE #( BASE <ls_acc>-%target ( %cid = lv_cid1
                                                          purchaseorderitem = <ls_vbap>-purchaseorderitem
                                                          accountassignmentnumber = lv_acc_no
                                                          costcenter = <ls_vbap>-costcenter
                                                          wbselementexternalid = <ls_vbap>-wbselement
                                                          "GLAccount = <ls_vbap>-glaccount

                                      %control = VALUE #( purchaseorderitem = if_abap_behv=>mk-on
                                                          accountassignmentnumber = if_abap_behv=>mk-on
                                                          costcenter = if_abap_behv=>mk-on
                                                          glaccount = if_abap_behv=>mk-on
                                                          wbselementexternalid = if_abap_behv=>mk-on )
                                   ) ).


    ENDLOOP.

    MODIFY ENTITIES OF i_purchaseordertp_2
        ENTITY PurchaseOrder
        CREATE BY \_purchaseorderitem FROM lt_purchase_order_item
        ENTITY purchaseorderitem
        CREATE BY \_purordaccountassignment FROM lt_po_acc_assign
        REPORTED FINAL(ls_reported)
        FAILED FINAL(ls_failed)
        MAPPED FINAL(ls_mapped).

    IF ls_failed-purchaseorder IS NOT INITIAL.
      LOOP AT ls_reported-purchaseorder ASSIGNING FIELD-SYMBOL(<ls_reported_po>).
        RAISE SHORTDUMP TYPE zcx_bc_message_wrapper
          USING MESSAGE.
      ENDLOOP.
    ENDIF.

While using this code i am continuously getting error " Numbering of child object does not match parent object (&1)." in ls_reported, only for PurchaseOrderItem - item 00030.

How can i solve this error.

BR.
Tushar

entry.title: Create ALP with Chart and RAP V4 Service
entry.content:
Hello

I am trying to create an Analytical List Page with a V4 Service in RAP. Everything is working except for the chart. It renders,but I get those errormessages:

This are my XML-Annotations I added:

<Annotations Target="SAP__self.RequisitionType">
    <Annotation Term="Aggregation.ApplySupported">
        <Record Type="Aggregation.ApplySupportedType">
            <PropertyValue Property="Transformations">
                <Collection>
                    <String>aggregate</String>
                    <String>topcount</String>
                    <String>bottomcount</String>
                    <String>identity</String>
                    <String>concat</String>
                    <String>groupby</String>
                    <String>filter</String>
                    <String>expand</String>
                    <String>search</String>
                </Collection>
            </PropertyValue>
            <PropertyValue Property="AggregatableProperties">
                <Collection>
                    <Record Type="Aggregation.AggregatablePropertyType">
                        <PropertyValue Property="Property" PropertyPath="ApprovalDaysForHighCostItems" />
                        <PropertyValue Property="RecommendedAggregationMethod" String="average" />
                    </Record>
                </Collection>
            </PropertyValue>
            <PropertyValue Property="GroupableProperties">
                <Collection>
                    <PropertyPath>CalendarYear</PropertyPath>
                </Collection>
            </PropertyValue>
        </Record>
    </Annotation>
    <Annotation Term="Analytics.AggregatedProperty" Qualifier="avg">
        <Record Type="Analytics.AggregatedPropertyType">
            <PropertyValue Property="Name" String="ApprovalDays" />
            <PropertyValue Property="AggregationMethod" String="average" />
            <PropertyValue Property="AggregatableProperty" PropertyPath="ApprovalDaysForHighCostItems" />
        </Record>
    </Annotation>
    <Annotation Term="UI.Chart">
        <Record Type="UI.ChartDefinitionType">
            <PropertyValue Property="Title" String="Sales Chart" />
            <PropertyValue Property="ChartType" EnumMember="UI.ChartType/Column" />
            <PropertyValue Property="Dimensions">
                <Collection>
                    <PropertyPath>CalendarYear</PropertyPath>
                </Collection>
            </PropertyValue>
            <PropertyValue Property="DynamicMeasures">
                <Collection>
                    <AnnotationPath>@Analytics.AggregatedProperty#avg</AnnotationPath>
                </Collection>
            </PropertyValue>
            <PropertyValue Property="DimensionAttributes">
                <Collection>
                    <Record Type="UI.ChartDimensionAttributeType">
                        <PropertyValue Property="Dimension" PropertyPath="CalendarYear" />
                        <PropertyValue Property="Role" EnumMember="UI.ChartDimensionRoleType/Category" />
                    </Record>
                </Collection>
            </PropertyValue>
            <PropertyValue Property="MeasureAttributes">
                <Collection>
                    <Record Type="UI.ChartMeasureAttributeType">
                        <PropertyValue Property="DynamicMeasure" AnnotationPath="@Analytics.AggregatedProperty#avg" />
                        <PropertyValue Property="Role" EnumMember="UI.ChartMeasureRoleType/Axis1" />
                    </Record>
                    <Record Type="UI.ChartMeasureAttributeType">
                        <PropertyValue Property="Measure" PropertyPath="ApprovalDaysForHighCostItems" />
                        <PropertyValue Property="Role" EnumMember="UI.ChartMeasureRoleType/Axis1" />
                    </Record>
                </Collection>
            </PropertyValue>
        </Record>
    </Annotation>
</Annotations>


I also found this post from @MioYasutake, which is pretty similiar, but I couldn't make it past this error. Maybe its because I have a cds view with parameters? I don't know, pls help ^^

entry.title: Updating Production Order Component Quantity as per Batch from Custom App to SAP Public Cloud
entry.content:
Hello Experts,

We are working with Custom Application (using RAP Application) in SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud, where Batch wise line items are created with fields such as Batch, Quantity, Unit of measurement , Plant, Material, Storage Location, Backflush Indicator, Material Category, & Sequence Category.

Our requirement is to update these line items in the Component tab of the Production Order in the standard SAP Public Cloud system.

In other words, each Batch wise line item created in the Custom Application should get populated in a corresponding component tab in the Production Order.

We explored the CDS view I_ProductionOrderOpComponentTP, but as it is not a root view, we are unable to perform transactional updates using EML (Entity Manipulation Language) for transactional updates.

Below is the field mapping for reference

 

CDS View FieldCustom App Field
RequiredQuantityQuantity
BaseUnitUOM
BatchBatch
PlantPlant
MaterialProduct
BillOfMaterialItemNumberLine Item Number
StorageLocationMRM1'
MatlCompIsMarkedForBackflush'X'
BillOfMaterialItemCategoryL'
SequenceCategory                          '0'


We would like to know if there is any available BAdI, API, or transactional CDS view that can be used to achieve this requirement.

Best Regards,

Thank you.

entry.title: How to implement Draft-like staging or caching for Custom Entities with large datasets?
entry.content:
Hi SAP Community experts,

I am currently working with a Custom Entity where the data is retrieved through complex custom logic (custom handler). When dealing with large datasets and implementing pagination ($top/$skip), I’ve noticed a performance issue: the custom logic triggers repeatedly for every page request.

Is there a way to implement a Draft Mode or a similar staging/caching mechanism for Custom Entities?

My goal is to:

  1. Execute the full custom logic only once.

  2. Temporarily persist or cache the result set (similar to how Draft tables work).

  3. Allow subsequent pagination requests to fetch data directly from this "draft" or cache instead of re-running the entire logic.

Are there any best practices or built-in features in CAP/RAP to handle this scenario effectively?

Thanks in advance for your help!

entry.title: Hide Buttons in Adaptation Project with Local Annotations
entry.content:
Hello

I have a simple question. Is it possible to hide buttons or actions within an adaptation project. I tried with Local Annotations but only managed to hide or relable columns. I don't know how to target the actions. Maybe its not even possible. Pls help^^

Here are all my variations I tried, but none of them worked:

<edmx:Edmx xmlns:edmx="http://docs.oasis-open.org/odata/ns/edmx" Version="4.0">
    <edmx:Reference Uri="https://sap.github.io/odata-vocabularies/vocabularies/Common.xml">
        <edmx:Include Namespace="com.sap.vocabularies.Common.v1" Alias="Common" />
    </edmx:Reference>
    <edmx:Reference Uri="https://sap.github.io/odata-vocabularies/vocabularies/UI.xml">
        <edmx:Include Namespace="com.sap.vocabularies.UI.v1" Alias="UI" />
    </edmx:Reference>
    <edmx:Reference Uri="https://sap.github.io/odata-vocabularies/vocabularies/Communication.xml">
        <edmx:Include Namespace="com.sap.vocabularies.Communication.v1" Alias="Communication" />
    </edmx:Reference>
    <edmx:Reference Uri="https://oasis-tcs.github.io/odata-vocabularies/vocabularies/Org.OData.Capabilities.V1.xml">
        <edmx:Include Namespace="Org.OData.Capabilities.V1" Alias="Capabilities" />
    </edmx:Reference>
    <edmx:Reference Uri="/sap/opu/odata4/sap/c_salesordermanage_srv/srvd/sap/c_salesordermanage_sd/0001/$metadata">
        <edmx:Include Namespace="com.sap.gateway.srvd.c_salesordermanage_sd.v0001" Alias="SAP__self" />
    </edmx:Reference>
    <edmx:DataServices>
        <Schema xmlns="http://docs.oasis-open.org/odata/ns/edm" Namespace="local_1773756144035">
            <Annotations Target="SAP__self.SalesOrderManageType/SalesOrder">
                <!-- <Annotation Term="UI.Hidden" Bool="true" /> -->
                <Annotation Term="Common.Label" String="asdf" />
            </Annotations>
            <Annotations Target="SAP__self.CreateWithSalesOrderType()">
                <Annotation Term="UI.IsAIOperation" Bool="true" />
            </Annotations>
            <Annotations Target="SAP__self.SetBillingBlock(SAP__self.SalesOrderManageType)/HeaderBillingBlockReason">
                <Annotation Term="SAP__common.Label" String="asdf" />
            </Annotations>
            <Annotations Target="SAP__self.SetBillingBlock(SAP__self.SalesOrderManageType)">
                <Annotation Term="UI.Hidden" Bool="true" />
            </Annotations>
            <Annotations Target="SAP__self.SalesOrderManageType/SetBillingBlock()">
                <Annotation Term="UI.Hidden" Bool="true" />
            </Annotations>
            <Annotations Target="SAP__self.Container/SetBillingBlock">
                <Annotation Term="UI.Hidden" Bool="true" />
                <Annotation Term="Common.Label" String="asdf" />
            </Annotations>
            <Annotations Target="SAP__self.Container/SalesOrderManage">
                <Annotation Term="UI.CreateHidden" Bool="true" />
                <Annotation Term="UI.Hidden" Bool="true" />
            </Annotations>
            <Annotations Target="com.sap.gateway.srvd.c_salesordermanage_sd.v0001.Container/SalesOrderManageType">
                <Annotation Term="UI.CreateHidden" Bool="true" />
            </Annotations>
            <Annotations Target="SAP__self.SalesOrderManageType">
                <Annotation Term="UI.CreateHidden" Bool="true" />
            </Annotations>
            <Annotations Target="SAP__self.SetBillingBlock(SAP__self.SalesOrderItemType)">
                <Annotation Term="SAP__Core.OperationAvailable" Bool="false" />
            </Annotations>
            <Annotations Target="SAP__self.DataFieldForAction/SetBillingBlock">
                <Annotation Term="UI.Hidden" Bool="true" />
            </Annotations>
            <Annotations Target="SAP__self.SetBillingBlock(SAP__self.SalesOrderItemType)">
                <Annotation Term="UI.Hidden" Bool="true" />
            </Annotations>
            <Annotations Target="SAP__self.SetBillingBlock(SAP__self.SalesOrderItemType)/ItemBillingBlockReason">
                <Annotation Term="UI.Hidden" Bool="true" />
            </Annotations>
            <Annotations Target="SAP__self.SalesOrderManageType/__OperationControl/SetBillingBlock">
                <Annotation Term="Common.Label" String="asdf" />
                <Annotation Term="UI.Hidden" Bool="true" />
            </Annotations>
            <Annotations Target="SAP__self.SalesOrderManageOperationControl/SetBillingBlock">
                <Annotation Term="UI.Hidden" Bool="true" />
            </Annotations>
            <Annotations Target="SAP__self.SalesOrderItemOperationControl/SetBillingBlock">
                <Annotation Term="UI.Hidden" Bool="true" />
            </Annotations>
        </Schema>
    </edmx:DataServices>
</edmx:Edmx>

entry.title: bgPF in RAP not working in quality env
entry.content:
Hello,

In a managed RAP App with unmanaged save, we call a Bapi through background processing framework at save time.

In Dev environment everything works correctly, the same not in Quality.

Following the abap cross trace, of Quality and Dev 

In quality the process is created but never starts.

The configuration of the bgrfc destinations seems identical.

Any suggestions ?

thank you
